content.text: At NSEC, we believe in the holistic development of students. Our various clubs provide a platform for students to showcase their talents and leadership skills.

items: **PHOENIX:** The official tech club of NSEC
**Rotaract Club:** For social service and community building
**Eco Cultural Club:** Promoting cultural awareness and environmental sustainability
**Sports Club:** Organizing annual sports meets and tournaments

content.text: Our students have won numerous accolades in national and international competitions, hackathons, and sports events.
Students are expected to maintain discipline and adhere to the institutional code of conduct at all times.
